message:
refactor(db): lazy semantic bridge accessors, import ordering, and rustfmt cleanup

Replace get_or_init_semantic_bridge() / get_or_init_two_tier_bridge()
with lazy get_semantic_bridge() / get_two_tier_bridge() on read-only
health and metrics code paths, preventing heavyweight model initialization
from triggering on normal write paths (enqueue_semantic_document) when
semantic indexing was never explicitly started.

Also applies consistent rustfmt formatting across integrity.rs, lib.rs
(alphabetized re-exports), queries.rs (single-line atomics), schema.rs
(test assertion formatting), and search_service.rs (import sort order,
closure indentation, cache key offset_proxy, finish_scoped_response calls).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
